recovery.title: Interrupted recording found
recovery.question: What should happen to this file?

recording.title: New Recording
recording.buffer_overflow_warning: Recording has reached the ~4 hour limit. New audio data is no longer being captured.

errors.whisperx_unavailable: WhisperX is not available. Please set up the Python environment: cd whisperx_runner && bash setup.sh
errors.transcription_timeout: Transcription took too long and was stopped. Increase the timeout in settings or check WhisperX.
errors.ollama_not_reachable: Ollama not reachable — is `ollama serve` running?
errors.boundary_message: This view could not be loaded. You can try again or return to the recording screen.

history.title: Meeting history
history.empty_state: No recordings yet. Start your first recording!
history.search_limit_hint: More than 20 results — refine your search for better matches.
history.bulk_delete_confirm: Really delete all meetings before {{date}}? This action cannot be undone.

output.subject: Subject
output.empty: No output yet — process a recording first.
output.audio_not_saved: Audio not saved (enable opt-in in Settings)
output.speaker_names_hint: Names are applied to the view only — the stored transcript is unchanged.
output.speaker_names_save_error: Failed to save speaker names — please try again.
output.title_save_error: Could not save title — please try again.
output.delete_confirm: Really delete this meeting? This action cannot be undone.
output.follow_up_save_error: Could not save draft — please try again.
output.stale_analysis_warning: This analysis was generated with an older template. Regenerate to get the current format.
output.participants_filter_hint: Click a name to see all meetings involving this person.

settings.title: Settings
settings.whisperx_timeout_hint: Default 900 (15 minutes). Increase for long meetings or slow hardware (60–86400).
settings.retain_audio_description: Default: audio is deleted after transcription. When enabled, the recording is stored encrypted in the app folder.
settings.retention_days_hint: Meetings older than X days are deleted automatically
settings.llm_model_override_hint: Manual selection is active — automatic RAM-based recommendation is no longer applied.
settings.ollama_timeout_hint: Default 300 (5 minutes). Increase for long meetings or slow hardware (30–3600).
settings.audio_device_hint: Choose the input device for recordings. Changes take effect on the next recording.
settings.custom_prompt_placeholder: System instruction for the LLM when recording a Custom meeting…
settings.custom_prompt_hint: Used when the meeting type is set to 'Custom'. Leave empty to use the default consulting prompt. Minimum 20 characters.
settings.bulk_regenerate_hint: Re-runs the AI analysis on all stored meetings. Useful after updating the custom prompt or after a template version upgrade.

onboarding.welcome_text: Brief transcribes your meetings locally — no cloud, no data sharing. Let’s quickly check that everything is ready.
onboarding.whisperx_missing: WhisperX not found. Please run setup.sh:
onboarding.whisperx_runner_hint_linux: Run from the Brief project directory — the folder is whisperx_runner.
onboarding.ollama_missing: Ollama not reachable. Please start it:
onboarding.meeting_type_text: What kind of conversations will you mainly use Brief for?
onboarding.done_text: Brief is ready to use. You can change settings anytime.

low_ram.title: Limited memory (8 GB)
low_ram.body: Brief recommends a smaller Ollama model for smooth performance. It may be slightly less precise on complex tasks, but runs reliably on this device. Please download the model manually:
